competitors.aiSummary:
# Kamino Summary

Kamino platforms show strong growth: xStocksFi Market reached $25M, OnRe Market exceeded $100M. Products include Vaults, Markets, and Multiply. New offerings enable borrowing against tokenized equities (SPY, QQQ, TSLA, NVDA, GOOG, MSTR, GLXY) and reinsurance-backed assets on Solana. No Drift protocol exposure.

tweets.fullText: Kamino can confirm that it has zero exposure to the Drift protocol compromise. Kamino users, across all products, including Vaults, Markets, and Multiply, are wholly unaffected.
tweets.aiAnalysis: The tweet performed moderately well (40K+ views) because it directly addresses a pressing security concern with unambiguous reassurance—a high-stakes emotional trigger that compels readers to verify the claim—though the lack of visual proof (screenshot, data, audit confirmation) and absence of a news hook (no timestamp context on *when* the compromise occurred) limited viral potential compared to more scandalous announcements.

Tokenized assets are scaling on Kamino. https://t.co/VLmQbdiUaq
tweets.aiAnalysis: The tweet leveraged a concrete milestone ($25M) and tangible real-world asset utility (borrowing against actual stock tickers) to create credibility, but the relatively modest engagement metrics suggest the audience either found the proposition niche (tokenized equities remain early-stage) or the announcement lacked urgency—hitting a $25M milestone is notable but not explosive enough to drive viral sharing without breaking news peg or controversy.
